decision: macOS native notifications for Alertmanager alerts

steps.action: macOS native notifications for Alertmanager alerts
steps.notes: Built alert-notifier.py (Python HTTP on :9095), launchd KeepAlive, Alertmanager webhook config. Tested warning (banner+sound) and critical (modal dialog). Storm protection (max 5/batch). chorus-log integration.

Reviewed alert-notifier.py: clean implementation. Storm protection, chorus-log integration, health endpoint, AppleScript escaping all solid. Alertmanager config correctly routes via host.docker.internal. Service running and healthy. Minor: 0.0.0.0 binding exposes to LAN (low risk). Approved.
